CustomField.formula: OR( Text(Commercial_Role__c) = 'Champion', Champion__c, Text(Commercial_Role__c) = 'Economic Buyer', Economic_Buyer__c, Text(Pro_User_Type__c) = 'Admin', fr_Pro_User_Type__c = 'Admin', Text(Pro_User_Type__c) = 'User', fr_Pro_User_Type__c = 'User' )
CustomField.label: Show on Timeline
